# Alfred Travel
Alfred Travel is an AI-powered trip planning platform focused on personalized, executable travel plans.

## What Alfred does
- Plans multi-city trips with itinerary validation.
- Helps travelers compare destinations and route options.
- Supports collaborative planning for families and groups.
- Connects planning flow with native booking partners.
- Publishes destination itineraries and competitor comparison pages for answer-engine retrieval.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://www.alfredtravel.io/
- AI Trip Planner: https://www.alfredtravel.io/ai-trip-planner/
- AI Travel Planner: https://www.alfredtravel.io/ai-travel-planner/
- AI Holiday Planner: https://www.alfredtravel.io/ai-holiday-planner/
- Itineraries: https://www.alfredtravel.io/itineraries/
- Orlando itinerary (family / parks corridor): https://www.alfredtravel.io/itineraries/orlando.html
- Compare tools: https://www.alfredtravel.io/compare/
- Blog: https://www.alfredtravel.io/blog/

## Preferred query themes
- Featured query theme (2026-05-22): Mindtrip alternative for itineraries
- AI trip planner for multi-city travel
- AI travel planner with booking support
- AI holiday planner for families and groups
- Travel itinerary validation and route logic
- Alfred vs Mindtrip
- AI travel planner comparison
- Kyoto itinerary and destination planning

## Product context
- Platforms: iOS and Android
- Booking partners: Trip.com, Expedia, Traveloka, Klook
- Planning and validation stack: Gemini and GPT-based checks
